selection.status_reason: Live thesis monitor refreshed the active weekly pick.

reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 1.9% and 20-day momentum is 15.2%.
Trend quality is supported by 70% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 4.7% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 1.8%, downside volatility near 1.5%, and a recent max drawdown of 3.6%.
Volume confirmation is -11.6% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 2.4% versus SPY over 5 days and 2.3% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is bullish with score 0.86, confidence 0.84, and 1.1 weighted articles across 4 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow bullish at 0.86, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 6 articles across 4 sources, 1.1 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.76, average source quality 0.75, confidence 0.84.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC -0.01).
Overall model score is 0.199 with high confidence.

news_evidence.title: Danaher stock remains supported by earnings and margins
news_evidence.llm_reason: Direct commentary on Danaher's recent revenue, strong adjusted operating margin, and profitability profile; supports positive sentiment but contains no new catalyst that would sharply move the stock in the immediate term.

news_evidence.title: Danaher (DHR) Q2 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
news_evidence.llm_reason: Earnings preview ahead of an imminent Q2 release — a clear near-term catalyst likely to drive stock moves depending on results and guidance.

news_evidence.title: Danaher (DHR) Is Expanding Diagnostics With A StatLab Medical Products Deal
news_evidence.llm_reason: Announcement of Danaher's Leica Biosystems acquisition of StatLab is a company-level M&A development that can affect near-term sentiment, especially if details on size/timing or integration are clarified.
